# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '16'

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run Tests
        run: npm test

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '16'

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build Project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Deploy to Production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_API_KEY }}
        run: npm run deploy
